name: Marcia Alessandra Dos Santos
education: Artificial Intelligence: Implications for Business Strategy from MIT Sloan Executive Education; Specialist, Software Engineering from Universidade Estadual de Campinas; Bachelor's degree, Computer Science from Universidade Federal de Viçosa
headline: Principal Software Engineer @ Microsoft| Leading Edge AI & Cloud Transformational Solutions | Brazil Community Lead @The WIT Network
about:
Passion and commitment drive my daily activities, enabling engineering teams to succeed on their transformational journey to excellence. With over twenty years of experience, I have consistently driven success for strategic customers and partners through first-class software development programs and agile processes.

I am highly collaborative, fostering cross-functional and organizational partnerships to grow people in their careers. My engineering management expertise includes budget planning, research, and creating roadmaps for innovation. In the last five years, I have partnered with and led talented engineers at Microsoft to build enterprise-grade solutions in the cloud.

Previously, I managed an R&D software organization with over 70 talented engineers, developing innovative solutions for Mobile Android and iOS, Artificial Intelligence research, and Web solutions across various industries such as IT/TELECOM, Agro, Healthcare, and other segments undergoing digital transformation.

Throughout my 20+ years in computer science, I have strategically and tactically led teams to create innovative solutions, demonstrating a natural sense of leadership and talent augmentation. My passion for understanding and motivating teams has driven me to invest on behavioral models and tools that respect people's differences and expertise.

Technology is a key factor in business growth, and AI has captured my attention for over a decade. I have invested in growing my skills on AI and adopting agents to accelerating my work. By exploring AI for real-world problems, I have gained the know-how to establish AI strategies, identify risks and achieve optimal results.

------
Industry Solution Engineering (ISE) is a global engineering organization that works directly with customers looking to leverage the latest technologies to address their toughest challenges & transform their industries using cloud-based solutions. We work in collaboration with Microsoft product teams, partners and open-source communities. 

We are continuously hiring engineers, technical program managers and data scientists globally. I am specifically looking to grow our organization in Redmond-US.

currentPositions.description: Transitioning to an IC role occurred due to a manager flattening re-organization at Microsoft, so I quickly embraced the new position by contributing to and advancing an ongoing development of AI Assistant for the Energy Industry with new experiments leveraging work of Data Scientists, refined responses and traceability. I also developed data and AI reference architecture for time series data ingestion which helped clarify concepts and facilitated discussions about top-tier solutions for hybrid batch and real-time data ingestion at the Edge to support Agentic solutions.

experiences.title: Principal Software Engineer
experiences.jobDescription: Transitioning to an IC role occurred due to a manager flattening re-organization at Microsoft, so I quickly embraced the new position by contributing to and advancing an ongoing development of AI Assistant for the Energy Industry with new experiments leveraging work of Data Scientists, refined responses and traceability. I also developed data and AI reference architecture for time series data ingestion which helped clarify concepts and facilitated discussions about top-tier solutions for hybrid batch and real-time data ingestion at the Edge to support Agentic solutions.

experiences.title: Principal Software Engineering Manager
experiences.jobDescription: At Microsoft, I focused on scaling expertise and enabling organizations to build top-tier Edge to Cloud solution for AI workloads and microservices for scalability. I led a talented team in developing transformative cloud solutions, influencing product roadmaps, and fostering career growth among engineers. My role emphasized adopting software engineering best practices for Cloud and Edge AI, including DevOps and Observability, to co-innovate with customers.

experiences.title: Director of Software Engineering for Business Applications - LATAM
experiences.jobDescription:
Enabling high-impact organizations to build enterprise-grade Business Applications on cloud.
Leading end-to-end development team of highly skilled engineers on strategic transformational cloud projects for customers and partners. The work executed also contributes to influencing Microsoft products’ improvement.
Providing thoughtful feedback, nurturing an inclusive engineering environment, championing engineering fundamentals and providing clarity and mentorship for team members in their careers. 
Conducting periodic performance reviews, making recommendations regarding compensation of team members.
Leading an organizational D&I Playbook initiative, a centralized place for communities and ally resources that foster inclusion. This initiative approaches inclusion throughout topics related, but not limited to neurodiversity, women in technology, Hispanic and Latinx community, meetings and accessibility.

experiences.title: Director of Software Engineering LATAM
experiences.jobDescription: Supporting our customers in strategic transformational projects | Building distributed systems on the cloud

experiences.title: Microsoft Innovation Center Campinas Manager
experiences.jobDescription:
Responsible for strategical and tactical management of Microsoft Innovation Center Campinas:
○	partnerships development
○	service lines definition and roll out
○	strategic interactions with academy

experiences.title: Research And Development Manager
experiences.jobDescription:
As head of a software department responsible for the tactical planning, budget control and forecast, I led and guided a multidisciplinary team of +70 talented engineers, project leaders and research specialists. 
These locally and remotely distributed engineers researched and built solutions for Internet of Things, Conversational Apps, Artificial Intelligence, Mobile Android, iOS
and multi-platform with expressive impact to customers' business: cost, time-to-market, process
and productivity KPI’s. 
During this time, I contributed to talent discovery, development and retention. 
I actively contributed to strategic planning, supporting executive board and proposing actions to enter new Market. I also supported already consolidated markets by proposing strategies to generate new opportunities.
Worked 2 years on market and technology trends analysis to support the healthcare strategy of the organization, being responsible for value propositions, competitors’ analysis and innovation opportunities identification according to the target market needs.
I was also responsible for organizational partnership development with world leading companies in Cloud and AI solutions.
Industries we supported: IT & Telecom, LifeScience, Manufacturing, Agribusiness, Call Center and Media.

experiences.title: Project Manager
System Analyst
experiences.jobDescription:
Focal point for customer technical subjects and negotiation. Responsible for design solutions and for features development. Also worked in the team allocation during the development of the scope for the system developed. 
Acted as requirements analyst and tester of the system functionalities.

experiences.title: Requirements Analyst and Consultant
experiences.jobDescription:
Requirements Analyst gathering requirements for Web development projects.
Worked as software engineering and software process tailoring consultant for bank and manufacturer business companies interested on interactive and incremental processes tailoring and implantation. 
Also acted as UML, Object Oriented Analysis and Design class instructor certified  (Certified Consultant IBM Rational)

experiences.title: System Analyst
experiences.jobDescription:
Worked proposing, developing and maintaining many features of a network management system (C++ and Java). Also interacted with Product team for features proposal and refinements. Worked on team allocation, quality assurance and bug report analysis.
PAT (Process Action team) member working on process creation and improvements based on CMM.

experiences.title: System Analyst
experiences.jobDescription: Designed and developed features for a simulation system for TDMA and GPRS mobile

patents.title: Embedding bitmap fonts in pdf files
patents.subtitle: US US 20140215325 A1 · Issued Jul 31, 2014
patents.description: A font is an electronic data file containing a set of glyphs, characters, or symbols. The term font may generally refer to a scalable set of digital shapes that may be printed at many different sizes. Some PDF (portable document format) files may include fonts that have not been embedded into the PDF file. That may be due to a copyright restriction that prevents the font from being embedded in the PDF file. One unfortunate result of an un-embedded font is that it may cause discrepancies when the file is printed which could produce unreadable text. PDF reader applications typically replace an un-embedded font with a similar font allowing the PDF file to be rendered and viewed on a computer display. Printing systems, however, may use an inappropriate font, may not allow the PDF file to be printed, or may not print the text of the un-embedded font.

recommendationsReceived.name: Eduardo Lomonaco
recommendationsReceived.subtitle: Delivery Solutions Architect at Databricks | Data & AI Advisory
recommendationsReceived.context: Eduardo reported directly to Marcia Alessandra
recommendationsReceived.description:
I've reported directly to Marcia for about 6 months on 2012. The project was an integration of an advanced supply chain planning module to the ERP system of a multi national electronics manufacturer.

Marcia is a very commited PM and will constantly add value to the client by closely tracking risks and requirements. She's very organized and engaged with the team and makes herself very available. I do recommend her as a Project Manager.

recommendationsReceived.name: Dalle .
recommendationsReceived.subtitle: COO | Partner
recommendationsReceived.description: Marcia Santos is the right person for Project Management Area. She is a goal-oriented professional who is always looking for high quality with excellent performance level. I had the pleasure to work with her during a LGE partnership with Eldorado Research Institute intended to develop a new and Innovative R&D SW Project.

recommendationsReceived.name: Lori Fraleigh
recommendationsReceived.subtitle: Executive specializing in developer platforms, SDKs, evangelism, ecosystems, and developer relations. Queen of Corner Cases. Currently part of Microsoft's Developer Division working on Azure SDKs.
recommendationsReceived.context: Lori worked with Marcia Alessandra but they were at different companies
recommendationsReceived.description: Marcia was the project manager on the MOTODEV Studio team at Eldorado while I was the overall manager for developer tools at Motorola.  During the two years I worked with her, I always found Marcia to be very thorough in reporting the current status of the project.  She always worked to quickly clarify any requirements or requests that were unclear and made me aware of issues and risks, as well as potential solutions, as soon as they were known.  Her diligence ensured the success of our project and she was a pleasure to work with.

recommendations.name: Christoph Schittko
recommendations.subtitle: Architect | Engineer | Leader | Innovator | Mentor | Community Builder
recommendations.context: Christoph was senior to Marcia Alessandra but didn't manage Marcia Alessandra directly
recommendations.description:
Christoph is a tremendous leader with high inclusive mindset. He supported me by mentoring and ensuring I was in the loop of his own direct reports when my management chain was under transition and I ended up without a direct reporting manager. He "adopted me" on his team with joy. 
He ensured organizational messages, opportunities, employee survey results were shared and discussed in the group.  Christoph carefully listen to ideas and recognizes contributions from the team. He is also communicative and open to try new ideas when it comes to his direct reports leadership style. He gives opportunity to new leaders to grow and ensures they are  mentored along the way.

recommendations.name: Jeanne V.
recommendations.subtitle: Sr. Technical Program Manager
recommendations.context: Marcia Alessandra worked with Jeanne on the same team
recommendations.description:
Jeanne is very committed to the work she does as Program Manager. She collaborates to unblock the team and facilitate interactions with customers and stakeholders to drive results. 
Her calm and happy way of working is contagious, contributing to a healthy work environment. During our interactions and partnership to deliver value to customers, Jeanne frequently looked for additional perspectives and ideas what contributed to identify new opportunities and solutions.  Jeanne demonstrates also interest and engages on sharing her learnings with peers and team members.

recommendations.name: Allan T.
recommendations.subtitle: Cloud Solution Architect at Microsoft
recommendations.description:
Allan is a fast paced and highly qualified engineer with contributions that positively impacted a sort of  customers from Automotive, Healthcare and Financial services.
Allan's troubleshooting skills are impressive and he demonstrated a natural analytical thinking allied to a high quality coding capabilities and a collaborative mindset. 
It was a pleasure to lead and work in partnership with Allan.

recommendations.name: Eduardo Lomonaco
recommendations.subtitle: Delivery Solutions Architect at Databricks | Data & AI Advisory
recommendations.description: Eduardo is one of the most committed persons I've had the opportunity to work. He has a great talent to hear and learn from others and he pays particular attention on delivering what is requested as a result of his activities. He accurately reports the status and with a good level of detail, so that a project manager can track the implementation of the project correctly. Eduardo also easily acquires knowledge about new technologies.

recommendations.name: Dalle .
recommendations.subtitle: COO | Partner
recommendations.description: Thiago is a highly committed professional that was responsible for driving LGE demands for an R&D project I had the pleasure to coordinate as a partnership. Always interested on reaching the project goals with total alignment with end-users, Thiago demonstrated an excellent sense of priority and partnership work.

recommendations.name: Lori Fraleigh
recommendations.subtitle: Executive specializing in developer platforms, SDKs, evangelism, ecosystems, and developer relations. Queen of Corner Cases. Currently part of Microsoft's Developer Division working on Azure SDKs.
recommendations.description:
I worked with Lori on a project of the Motodev Program. She was one of the most engaged and talented sponsors I had the pleasure to work with.
Even being sponsor of the project, she always considered herself and was considered as part of the execution team. With great technical and managerial skills, Lori had deep understanding of technical issues and external risks raised to her, being able to help me out to mitigate those risks every time it was needed. She has a great ability to manage multi-site teams.

recommendations.name: Renato Pinheiro
recommendations.subtitle: Senior Software Developer
recommendations.context: Marcia Alessandra worked with Renato but on different teams
recommendations.description:
It was a pleasure to work with Renato. 
He is very talented and has a strong software development´s skill, being able to work on challenging projects.
He delivers the work on time and with good quality.

recommendations.name: Vinicius Pagano
recommendations.subtitle: Business Director at ELDORADO
recommendations.context: Marcia Alessandra reported directly to Vinicius
recommendations.description: Vini is a highly focused person with a great business vision. He always tries to anticipate himself to customer needs. He drives the teams under his supervision to get over expectations and to focus on results. He is very dedicated.He teached me a lot in those past years, specially on always doing the work in the best way possible to the client.

recommendations.name: Rodrigo Luis Nolli Brossi
recommendations.subtitle: Software Project Lead @ Mercado Livre Brasil | MBA, DevOps
recommendations.context: Marcia Alessandra was senior to Rodrigo Luis Nolli but didn't manage Rodrigo Luis Nolli directly
recommendations.description: Rodrigo Brossi is very dedicated to the activities assigned to him. He has a  very good relationship with coworkers, always ready to share knowledge and learn with senior engineers.
